======================================================================
DATA STUB: Synthetic placeholder dataset constructed
Total scientists: 2000
Frontier scientists: 200
Non-frontier scientists: 1800
======================================================================

INDICATORS CONSTRUCTED:
  - ln_total_citations: Log(1 + total citations)
  - ln_total_publications: Log(1 + total publications)
  - ln_career_age: Log(1 + career age)
  - citations_per_pub: Total citations / total publications
  - publications_per_year: Total publications / career age
  - citations_per_year: Total citations / career age

======================================================================
DESCRIPTIVE STATISTICS: Frontier vs Non-Frontier Scientists
======================================================================

career_age:
  Frontier (n=200): mean=29.520, std=5.106
  Non-Frontier (n=1800): mean=24.634, std=5.033
  Difference (Frontier - Non-Frontier): 4.886

total_publications:
  Frontier (n=200): mean=39.655, std=33.491
  Non-Frontier (n=1800): mean=24.639, std=27.933
  Difference (Frontier - Non-Frontier): 15.016

total_citations:
  Frontier (n=200): mean=3912.815, std=6102.315
  Non-Frontier (n=1800): mean=766.676, std=2066.862
  Difference (Frontier - Non-Frontier): 3146.139

h_index:
  Frontier (n=200): mean=35.095, std=12.906
  Non-Frontier (n=1800): mean=17.816, std=9.515
  Difference (Frontier - Non-Frontier): 17.279

field_weighted_citation_impact:
  Frontier (n=200): mean=2.588, std=0.790
  Non-Frontier (n=1800): mean=1.009, std=0.483
  Difference (Frontier - Non-Frontier): 1.579

international_collaboration_rate:
  Frontier (n=200): mean=0.680, std=0.145
  Non-Frontier (n=1800): mean=0.502, std=0.168
  Difference (Frontier - Non-Frontier): 0.178

institutional_mobility:
  Frontier (n=200): mean=2.565, std=1.750
  Non-Frontier (n=1800): mean=1.218, std=1.086
  Difference (Frontier - Non-Frontier): 1.347

years_to_tenure:
  Frontier (n=130): mean=8.268, std=1.942
  Non-Frontier (n=1275): mean=10.876, std=3.020
  Difference (Frontier - Non-Frontier): -2.609

citations_per_pub:
  Frontier (n=200): mean=199.509, std=385.670
  Non-Frontier (n=1800): mean=81.458, std=379.055
  Difference (Frontier - Non-Frontier): 118.051

publications_per_year:
  Frontier (n=200): mean=1.402, std=1.271
  Non-Frontier (n=1800): mean=1.046, std=1.252
  Difference (Frontier - Non-Frontier): 0.356

======================================================================
MODEL 1: OLS Regression - Predictors of Frontier Status
Specification: frontier_status ~ career_age + ln_total_publications +
                ln_total_citations + h_index + field_weighted_citation_impact +
                international_collaboration_rate + institutional_mobility +
                years_to_tenure + field + gender + country
